table_summary: Swap хэлцлийн өдрийн үлдэгдлийн дэлгэрэнгүй мэдээллийг агуулсан харагдац. Зөвхөн swap хэлцлүүдийн (FX_DEAL_DETAIL дахь IS_SWAP=1) өдөр тутмын үлдэгдэл, хүүний хуримтлал, үнэлгээний тэгшитгэл, тэнцлийн гадуурх мэдээллийг хамарна. Хэлцэл хэрхэн өөрчлөгдөж буйг хянахад ашиглана. (A view providing daily financial snapshots for SWAP deals only. Each row represents one swap leg on one specific TXN_DATE. Contains daily balances, interest accruals, revaluation, and off-balance information. Only deals with IS_SWAP=1 from FX_DEAL_DETAIL appear here. Use this to track how swap deals evolve over time. Use FX_DEAL_DETAIL to understand deal definitions.)

column_descriptions.txn_date: Гүйлгээний огноо (Transaction Date). The snapshot date for the swap balance. **This is the most important column for time-based queries. To find the latest state, use MAX(txn_date).** Multiple rows exist per deal over time (one row per TXN_DATE). Sample values: '2025-01-15', '2025-02-01'.
column_descriptions.deal_code: Хэлцлийн дугаар (Deal Code). The deal identifier linking to FX_DEAL_DETAIL. **Use to join with FX_DEAL_DETAIL for deal properties.** Sample values: 'SWFR25110500003', 'SWSP25110500002'.
column_descriptions.swap_code: Swap дугаар (Swap Code). The swap identifier grouping related deal legs. Sample values: 'SWAP25110500001', 'SWAP25090200002'.
column_descriptions.acnt_code: Дансны дугаар (Account Code). Account code corresponding to the deal_code. Used for settlement. Sample values: 'MN700036003600009315', 'MN100036003600009231'.
column_descriptions.swap_acnt_code: Swap дансны дугаар (Swap Account Code). Account code corresponding to the swap_code. Sample values: 'MN430036003600009316', 'MN850036003600009239'.
column_descriptions.cust_code: Харилцагчийн дугаар (Customer Code). The unique identifier for the counterparty. Sample values: '9360000049'.
column_descriptions.customer_name: Харилцагчийн нэр (Customer Name). The name of the counterparty institution. **Use UPPER() for case-insensitive matching.** Sample values: 'МОНГОЛ БАНК', 'ХААН БАНК'.
column_descriptions.prod_code: Бүтээгдэхүүний код (Product Code). The product code for the deal. Sample values: '61050301', '61050210'.
column_descriptions.prod_name: Бүтээгдэхүүний нэр (Product Name). The product name. Sample values: 'СПОТ АРИЛЖАА', 'СВОП АРИЛЖАА-БОДИТ БУС /1 ЖИЛ ДЭЭШ ХУГАЦААТАЙ/'.
column_descriptions.prod_type: Бүтээгдэхүүний төрөл (Product Type). The type of FX product. Sample values: 'SPOT', 'FORWARD'.
column_descriptions.description: Нэмэлт тайлбар (Description). Additional description or notes about the deal.
column_descriptions.dealer_id: Диллерын код (Dealer ID). The employee ID of the dealer who executed the deal. Sample values: '10510', '10097'.
column_descriptions.dealer_name: Диллерын нэр (Dealer Name). The name of the dealer. **Use UPPER() for case-insensitive matching.** Sample values: 'ДАГМЭДМАА', 'ӨЛЗИЙСАЙХАН'.
column_descriptions.deal_status: Хэлцлийн төлөв (Deal Status). **CRITICAL for filtering active deals.** C=Хаагдсан (Closed), D=Цуцалсан (Cancelled), SF=Төлөлт дууссан (Settlement Finished), SS=Төлөлт эхэлсэн (Settlement Started), S=Эхэлсэн (Started), N=Шинэ (New). **For active deals use: deal_status NOT IN ('C', 'D').** Sample values: 'N', 'S', 'SS', 'SF', 'C', 'D'.
column_descriptions.buy_sell: Арилжааны төрөл (Buy/Sell). The direction of the trade. **S=Зарсан (Sold), B=Худалдаж авсан (Bought).** Sample values: 'S', 'B'.
column_descriptions.buy_cur_code: Худалдаж авсан валютын код (Buy Currency Code). The currency being purchased. Sample values: 'USD', 'EUR', 'MNT'.
column_descriptions.sell_cur_code: Зарах валютын код (Sell Currency Code). The currency being sold. Sample values: 'MNT', 'USD', 'EUR'.
column_descriptions.buy_rate: Худалдаж авах валютын ханш (Buy Rate). The exchange rate for the buy currency. Sample values: 3450.0, 3720.0.
column_descriptions.sell_rate: Зарах валютын ханш (Sell Rate). The exchange rate for the sell currency. Sample values: 1.0, 3450.0.
column_descriptions.deal_date: Хэлцэл хийсэн огноо (Deal Date). The date when the deal was originally executed. Sample values: '2025-01-15', '2025-02-01'.
column_descriptions.buy_date: Худалдаж авах талын валютлах огноо (Buy Value Date). The settlement date for the buy side. Sample values: '2025-01-17', '2025-06-15'.
column_descriptions.sell_date: Зарах талын валютлах огноо (Sell Value Date). The settlement date for the sell side. Sample values: '2025-01-17', '2025-06-15'.
column_descriptions.sell_amount: Зарах дүн (Sell Amount). The original sell amount from the deal. Sample values: 3450000000.0, 186000000.0.
column_descriptions.buy_amount: Худалдаж авах дүн (Buy Amount). The original buy amount from the deal. Sample values: 1000000.0, 50000000.0.
column_descriptions.deal_rate: Хэлцлийн ханш (Deal Rate). The contracted exchange rate for the deal. Sample values: 3450.0, 3720.0.
column_descriptions.market_rate: Зах зээлийн ханш (Market Rate). The current market exchange rate as of txn_date. Used for calculating profit/loss and revaluation. Sample values: 3455.0, 3440.0.
column_descriptions.margin: Маржин (Margin). The profit margin, calculated as difference between deal_rate and market_rate. Sample values: 5.0, -10.0.
column_descriptions.profit_loss: Ашиг, алдагдал (Profit/Loss). The current profit or loss based on deal_rate vs market_rate difference. Updated daily. Positive = profit, Negative = loss. Sample values: 5000000.0, -250000.0, 0.
column_descriptions.swap_give_int_rate: Swap өгөх хүүний хувь (Swap Give Interest Rate). The interest rate to be paid on the swap. Sample values: 5.5, 6.0.
column_descriptions.swap_take_int_rate: Swap авах хүүний хувь (Swap Take Interest Rate). The interest rate to be received on the swap. Sample values: 5.0, 5.5.
column_descriptions.buy_amount_bal: Авлага (Buy Amount Balance/Receivable). The outstanding receivable balance on the buy side. Sample values: 1000000.0, 0.
column_descriptions.sell_amount_bal: Өглөг (Sell Amount Balance/Payable). The outstanding payable balance on the sell side. Sample values: 3450000000.0, 0.
column_descriptions.give_int_bal: Өгөх хүүний үлдэгдэл (Give Interest Balance). Outstanding interest to be paid. Sample values: 150000.0, 0.
column_descriptions.take_int_bal: Авах хүүний үлдэгдэл (Take Interest Balance). Outstanding interest to be received. Sample values: 200000.0, 0.
column_descriptions.int_rcv: Хүүний хуримтлагдсан авлага (Accrued Interest Receivable). Interest that has accrued and is receivable. Sample values: 50000.0, 0.
column_descriptions.int_pay: Хүүний хуримтлагдсан өглөг (Accrued Interest Payable). Interest that has accrued and is payable. Sample values: 45000.0, 0.
column_descriptions.int_rcv_bill: Авах хүүний билл (Interest Receivable Bill). Billed interest receivable. Sample values: 25000.0, 0.
column_descriptions.int_pay_bill: Өгөх хүүний билл (Interest Payable Bill). Billed interest payable. Sample values: 22000.0, 0.
column_descriptions.reval_asset: Хөрөнгө (Revaluation Asset). Asset value from mark-to-market revaluation. Sample values: 5000000.0, 0.
column_descriptions.reval_liability: Өр төлбөр (Revaluation Liability). Liability value from mark-to-market revaluation. Sample values: 0, 3000000.0.
column_descriptions.reval_inc: Үнэлгээний тэгшитгэлийн орлого (Revaluation Income). Income recognized from favorable rate movements. Sample values: 2000000.0, 0.
column_descriptions.reval_exp: Үнэлгээний тэгшитгэлийн зардал (Revaluation Expense). Expense recognized from unfavorable rate movements. Sample values: 0, 1500000.0.
column_descriptions.buy_amount_off: Тэнцлийн гадуурх авлага (Off-Balance Receivable). Receivable amount recorded off-balance sheet. Sample values: 50000000.0, 0.
column_descriptions.sell_amount_off: Тэнцлийн гадуурх өглөг (Off-Balance Payable). Payable amount recorded off-balance sheet. Sample values: 172500000000.0, 0.
column_descriptions.leg_number: Хөлийн дугаар (Leg Number). **1=near leg (ойрын хөл), 2=far leg (холын хөл).** Near leg settles first, far leg settles later in swap deals. Sample values: 1, 2.
column_descriptions.days_to_maturity: Хэлцэл дуусах хүртэлх өдрийн тоо (Days to Maturity). Number of days until the deal matures/settles. **Use for filtering deals maturing soon.** Sample values: 30, 90, 365, 0.
column_descriptions.last_reval_date: Сүүлд үнэлгээний тэгшитгэл хийсэн огноо (Last Revaluation Date). The date of the most recent mark-to-market revaluation. Sample values: '2025-01-31', '2025-02-15'.
